NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING DEEMED ADMISSIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 74719956) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAKAI, ROBERT SAKAI, PAUL HEARING SET FOR NOV-06-2024 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 525, AS TO THE NOV-25-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS ROBERT SAKAI, AND PAUL SAKAI'S MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING DEEMED ADMISSIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFFS UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING DEEMED ADMISSIONS (C.C.P. SECTION 2033.280) IS GRANTED. THE RFAS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PAY $250 IN SANCTIONS WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND EMAIL IT TO JUDGE PRO TEM PETER CATALANOTTI AT PETER.CATALANOTTI@WILSONELSER.COM . JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (525/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Deemed Admissions
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFFS ROBERT SAKAI, AND PAUL SAKAI's Motion For Order Establishing Deemed Admissions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs unopposed Motion For Order Establishing Deemed Admissions (C.C.P. section 2033.280) is GRANTED. The RFAs are deemed admitted. Defendant is ordered to pay $250 in sanctions within two weeks of notice of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and email it to Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti at peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com .

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (525/JPT)
